calendar.matters:
(Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformity Therewith
Off Calendar Oct-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SDG ARCHITECTS, INC. (Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformity Therewith. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition granted. Petitioner must prepare a proposed judgment that adopts verbatim the arbitrator's award as set forth pg. 27, line 20; page 28, line 13. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Gregory Valenza, of Shaw Valenza LLP (415) 983-5960, appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Lawrence Townsend, Attorney at Law, (415) 8823288 appearing for Respondent. Motion is off calendar.
